作为一个平平无奇的宠物医生，楚晨想不到自己会跟凶杀案扯上关系，好在关键时刻，楚晨利用自己能与动物对话的特殊能力，帮自己洗清了嫌疑。但也因此，楚晨平静的生活彻底被打破了，各种各样的求助纷纷找上门，诡异失踪案、剥皮案、斗狗场血案…
一只麻雀，一只蚂蚁，甚至是一只蚊子，只要它们曾出现过在案发现场，它们就能给楚晨还原案发经过。
谁说案发现场没有目击者？
在楚晨看来，到处都是目击者啊！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/f09028d76ad61c6e2c40f40cda7105ff","author":"妍妍小可","author_id":"","book_id":"7476868458286697496","book_name":"听懂兽语，还怕凶案没目击者？","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#203048","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":751,"name":"悬疑灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=751&name=悬疑灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":61,"name":"推理","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=61&name=推理&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":505,"name":"破案","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=505&name=破案&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7476868668672983576","read_count":"14349","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1586005"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.1","serial_count":"776","tags":"悬疑灵异,悬疑,推理,破案","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/d9bb6cc2a606b6819a1e1edc579c32de~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779453869&x-signature=p2ZfE0F6CmoWNKCaa49TonvZfPI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"169783106213802","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"224"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323204429ED87FF80D56B089CBF52"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读14小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":11,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":51905,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":4161},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7490773421045302078","
